opportunities.value: Promotes the maturity model from doctrine to enforced policy.
Unlocks all cross-product queries and platform intelligence.
Highest user-facing impact; reduces support burden directly.
Enables semantic search and RAG without re-architecting the knowledge core.
es-CO baseline + BCP-47 variants; large addressable surface.
Reuse procedural-semantics + component-visibility without new schemas.
Maturity + lineage rules are machine-checkable; CI hooks are a small step.
A controlled inbound channel for support-record evidence with explicit trust rules.

subordination_rule: Every opportunity remains subordinate to the knowledge core. None of them originates knowledge.
